# BREAKING: China's Kimi K3 Just Dropped a 2.8 Trillion Parameter Open AI Model
## AIM Network
326000 subscribers
10 likes

### Description
259 views
Posted: 17 Jul 2026
Moonshot AI's Kimi K3 just landed, an open-weight model with 2.8 trillion parameters and a 1-million-token context window, the world's first open 3T-class model. It runs a Mixture-of-Experts architecture with 896 experts (16 active per token) and reportedly outperforms GPT 5.5 and Claude Opus 4.8 on several benchmarks.

✅ Cypher 2026: Join 5,000+ AI leaders. Book now → 
✅ Chess League: Test your skills → [...] नैरेटिव वॉर इन एआई जस्ट शिफ्टेड गियर्स। सिलिकॉन वैली वांट्स यू लॉक्ड इन। वॉल्ड गार्डन्स पेड एपीआई कॉल्स। बेजिंग्स मून शॉट एआई इज प्लेइंग अ कंप्लीटली डिफरेंट गेम। दे जस्ट ड्रॉप्ड किमी के थ्री। इट इज ओपन। इट इज़ मैसिव। एंड इट इज़ गनिंग फॉर द अब्सोल्यूट ब्लीडिंग एज। वी आर टॉकिंग 2.8 ट्रिलियन पैरामीटर्स। द वर्ल्ड्स फर्स्ट ओपन थ्री टी क्लास बहमत। यू गेट अ 1 मिलियन टोकन कॉन्टेक्स्ट विंडो राइट आउट ऑफ द गेट। दैट इज लाइक अपलोडिंग द एंटायर लॉर्ड ऑफ द रिंग्स स्ट्रिलजी ट्वाइस एंड स्टिल हैविंग रूम फॉर डायरेक्टर्स कमेंट्री। ब्रूट फ़ोर्स इज़ आउट। एफिशिएंसी इज़ द न्यू करेंसी। K3 यूजज़ अ मिक्सचर ऑफ़ एक्सपर्ट्स आर्किटेक्चर। 896 एक्सपर्ट्स लिव इनसाइड दिस मॉडल। बट हियर इज़ द ट्रिक। इट ओनली वेक्स अप 16 एक्सपर्ट्स पर टोकन। मून शॉट कॉल्स इट द स्टेबल लेटेंट एमओई फ्रेमवर्क। इट इज लीन। इट इज एक्सट्रीमली फास्ट। दे बिल्ट इट [...] फ्रेमवर्क। इट इज लीन। इट इज एक्सट्रीमली फास्ट। दे बिल्ट इट ऑन कस्टम आर्किटेक्चर। किमी डेल्टा अटेंशन अटेंशन रेसिड्यूअल्स केडीए एंड अटेंशन रेस फॉर द नर्ड्स कीपिंग स्कोर। द रिजल्ट इट स्केल्स 2 एंड हाफ टाइम्स बेटर देन इट्स प्रेडसेसर। किमी के टू ओ एंड इट सीज़ नेटिवली विज़न इज़ बेक्ड राइट इन नाउ फॉर द स्कोरबोर्ड मून शर्ट इज़ प्लेइंग द ऑनेस्टी कार्ड इट इज़ अ पावरफुल पीआर वेपन दे एडमिट दे आर ट्रेलिंग द एब्सोल्यूट एपिकेक्स प्रिडेटर्स ओपन आई ओपन एआई जीपीटी 5.6 सॉल एंड थ्रोपिक्स क्लर्ड फेबल फाइव दोज़ प्रोपराइटरी टाइटंस स्टिल होल्ड द क्राउन बट K3 इज़ इज़ निपिंग एट देयर हील्स। इट इज़ आउट इट आउटराइट बीट्स जीपीटी 5.5 इट क्रशेस एंथ्रोपिक्स ओपस 4.8 ओपन वेट्स जस्ट बॉडी स्लैम्ड यस्टरडेज प्रोपराइटरी चैंपियंस। द गैप इज क्लोजिंग एंड इट इज़ हैप्पेनिंग फास्ट। व्हाट डस दिस एक्चुअली मीन फॉर यू? इफ यू कोड पे अटेंशन। K3 सीट्स

results.title: Kimi K3 IS INSANE! Best Open Model EVER That BEATS ...
results.content:
What an incredible day, cuz Moonshot AI is back with one of the most impressive model launches of the year, Kimi K3, an open frontier intelligence model. The Kimi K3 is a 2.8 trillion parameter open-source model with a 1 million token context window. It is natively multimodal, but that's not even the best part. It's currently ranked third overall on the world of AI benchmark, putting it in the same conversation as Claude Fable 5 and GPT 5.6 Soul, officially joining the current top tier of frontier models, which is just mind-boggling. The K3 is built for long-horizon agentic coding and self-evolving workflows. It outperforms Claude Opus 4.8 on coding across every benchmark. results.content: world. This is just uh very simple version of Minecraft uh for this one. All right. It did as well as GPD 5.6 Soul for the movement, but man, it definitely completed rendering the entire game world. There's a floating rock there. We can mine the stone and the wood. So, we can go to the workbench and craft. But it still has the issue where whatever we craft uh spawns where we stand. So, you see that it spawned right up my ass. Look at that. But all in all, very happy with this one, too, just for the first uh oneshot prompt, first try. So, low poly world, big pass. Now, next up is office life. Office life for some reason this seems like a simple task but it's very hard for a lot of the other models to do in terms of the path finding. Even for this one notice how the path finding is a lot [...] powerful for running loops especially if you incorporate agent swarms on it. Now going back to the blog, okay, they have specified they were very upfront about this uh about the limitations of Kimmy K3. So it's very sensitive to thinking history because key uh K3 was trained in the preserved thinking history mode. So if the agent harness fails to pass back all the historical thinking content as required or if an ongoing session with another model is switched over to K3 then the generation quality may become highly unstable. We recommend using a harness with verified compatibility such as Kimmy code and avoid switching to K3 in the middle of a session. So if you're using K3 in another harness, let's say if you're on Kilo code or open code, uh it's not going to be as good as it is on Kimmy [...] movement. Uh and the last limitation that they said, you know, despite being a highly competitive model overall, K3 nonetheless exhibits a noticeable gap in user experience compared with Cloud Fable 5 and GBD 5.6 Soul. Well, basically, you know, it's just today, but I already find that it is certainly up there top three, that's for sure. And I think in terms of raw capability, it's still not as strong as Fable 5, that's for sure. Plan mode, Fable 5 is still the goat even compared to all of these models, but coding is trash for Fable 5. So, how I'm using K3 right now is just to continue the work of of Fable 5's plan mode specs. But all in all, it has been super fun playing with Kim K3. This is my new main now in terms of the Chinese open models. Before it was GLM 5.2, but now Kim K3. So,

results.title: Moonshot AI launches Kimi K3
results.content:
Customer Stories

These enterprises are making big waves with technology use cases.

# Moonshot AI launches Kimi K3

Published July 16, 2026

Copy link Link Copied

Copied to clipboard

Moonshot AI released its Kimi K3 model, a 2.8T parameter large language model the company said is on par with Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.8 and OpenAI GPT-5.5.

Kimi K3 lands as the open model battle kicks off in earnest. Even in the US, the land of proprietary, token budget busting models, has new open model players such as Thinking Machines, which just released its Inkling open-weight mixture-of-experts model that's trained for broad usage rather than optimized. The company outlined the details in a blog post.

SpaceXAI's move to open source Grok Build is another US open entry worth watching. [...] Rightsizing open models may cut your AI inference spend
 SpaceXAI, Meta puts pricing squeeze on Anthropic, OpenAI
 Moonshot's Kimi K2.5 introduces agent swarm, highlights open source model momentum

Assuming Moonshot's benchmarking is correct, Kimi K3 may be shortening the distance between proprietary and open models. In a blog post, Kimi noted:

> "While its overall performance still trails the most powerful proprietary models, Claude Fable 5 and GPT 5.6 Sol, Kimi K3 demonstrated frontier-level performance across our evaluation suite, consistently outperforming other tested models."

Kimi said that full model weights will be released by July 27.

Kimi K3

Here's what you need to know about Kimi K3: [...] Kimi K3

Here's what you need to know about Kimi K3:

 Kimi K3 is a 2.8T-parameter model.
 There's a 1 million token context window.
 Vision capabilities are native.
 Kimi K3 is a scaled up mixture-of-experts model.
 Kimi K3 is built on recent architectural updates Kimi Delta Attention (KDA) and Attention Residuals (AttnRes).
 The model was built to optimize GPU kernels.
 Kimi K3 built a chip design based on itself in a proof of concept.

As for the pricing, which is the main thing being closely watched, Kimi K3 pricing is 30 cents per million cached input tokens, $3 per million non-cached input tokens and $15 per million tokens for output.

More:
